Pinyin: Běi jīng de tiān qì bú cuò ma!
English: The weather in Beijing is pretty nice!

Pinyin: Duì, bù lěng yě bú rè, tǐng shū fú.
English: Yes, it’s neither cold nor hot, quite comfortable.

Simplified: 只有秋天这样，夏天太热，冬天又太冷。
Traditional: 只有秋天這樣，夏天太熱，冬天又太冷。
Pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu qiū tiān zhè yàng, xià tiān tài rè, dōng tiān yòu tài lěng.
English: Only autumn is like this; summer is too hot, and winter is too cold.

Simplified: 这么说，我来的正是时候。
Traditional: 這麼說，我來的正是時候。
Pinyin: Zhè me shuō, wǒ lái de zhèng shì shí hòu.
English: So, I came at just the right time.
